summary: The exact clawsembly-hello-agent 0.2.0 artifact staged with verified per-file digests, reached both readiness signals with a live capability mailbox, answered hello.say 1 time(s), completed 4 capability-mediated chat turn(s) across the default-deny boundary (2 denied, 1 allowed), and completed guest-supervisor shutdown in Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) HeadlessChrome/149.0.7827.55 Safari/537.36.
